title: Permission Administration
text:
D1 permission manager

  Cloudflare Access is a separate login gate. If its policy uses an email allowlist, add the client there too. This page controls D1 product and talent permissions after login.


Add clients, assign products and talents, and deactivate access without putting client data in GitHub. All changes are written directly to Cloudflare D1.
